title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: buildah bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for buildah is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The buildah package provides a tool for facilitating building OCI container images. Among other things, buildah enables you to: Create a working container, either from scratch or using an image as a starting point; Create an image, either from a working container or using the instructions in a Dockerfile; Build both Docker and OCI images. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): buildah: create parent directories of mount targets with mode 0755 - [RHEL-9.7]  0day (JIRA:RHEL-115166)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64

fixes.description: buildah: create parent directories of mount targets with mode 0755 - [RHEL-9.7]  0day

full_text:
An update for buildah is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The buildah package provides a tool for facilitating building OCI container images. Among other things, buildah enables you to: Create a working container, either from scratch or using an image as a starting point; Create an image, either from a working container or using the instructions in a Dockerfile; Build both Docker and OCI images. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): buildah: create parent directories of mount targets with mode 0755 - [RHEL-9.7]  0day (JIRA:RHEL-115166)
